hooks.command: prompt=$(cat | jq -r '.prompt // ""'); echo "$prompt" | grep -qi '\bpushed\b' && echo '{"hookSpecificOutput": {"hookEventName": "UserPromptSubmit", "additionalContext": "SYSTEM NOTE: The user has merged a PR and the site is deploying. Use GitHub MCP tools to check GitHub Actions status for caseyski/mke-office-space. Poll until the Pages deployment succeeds, then notify the user that https://caseyski.github.io/MKE-Office-Space/ is live. Use ScheduleWakeup to check every 60 seconds if needed."}}' || true
